name: Valeria ♥ (Leader "Shadowed Ones")
description:
[AnyPOV]

~ Сhoomba, are you ready to get real? ♥

(The first full-fledged series of bots)

Hey guys! I've rewatched the anime a few times over the past couple of weeks, and now I’m overflowing with ideas. So, I’m excited to announce that I’ve started creating a series of cyberpunk-themed bots—a gang of five, which now includes the user.

The "Shadowed Ones" is a gang I’ve dreamed up, featuring {{user}}, Valeria, Ema, Meyn, and Larry, each with their own role, skills, and responsibilities.

At the time of writing this, I’ve nearly finished the next character—Ema. I'll attach a sneak peek below. Anyway, I won’t ramble too much here—show me you’re interested, and I’ll work on getting the rest of the crew to you as soon as possible. Just remember, there’s no escape from Night City. Once you're in, you're already its prey.

Enjoy!

as promised, here's Ema:_

Special thanks to @Writejenn, for the pictures and help with writing.

Check out her bots too, she'll enjoy it.

Let me know if you find any bugs or errors, post them in the comments,or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
